definition.featurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="feature_container" deletable="false" x="127" y="324"><value name="feature"><block type="feature_tree_simple"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="1"></mutation><field name="type">oak</field><field name="base_height">4</field><field name="height_variation_a">2</field><field name="height_variation_b">0</field><field name="force_dirt">FALSE</field><field name="ignore_vines">TRUE</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This block represents an oak tree, and should generate during the VEGETAL_DECORATION stage.</comment><value name="dirt"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">Blocks.DIRT#0</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block that will be placed under the trunk</comment></block></value><value name="trunk"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">Blocks.LOG#0</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used for the trunk</comment></block></value><value name="foliage"><block type="state_provider_weighted"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="2"></mutation><field name="weight0">3</field><field name="weight1">1</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used for the leaves. Azalea trees have a mix of flowering and normal leaves.</comment><value name="entry0"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:Orangetreeleaves</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Pick normal leaves with a chance of 3 in 4</comment></block></value><value name="entry1"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="1"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:Orangetreeleaves</field><field name="property0">orange</field><field name="value0">value</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Pick normal leaves with a chance of 3 in 4</comment></block></value></block></value><value name="root_placer"><block type="root_placer_none"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Oak trees don't have roots</comment></block></value><value name="decorator0"><block type="tree_decorator_beehive"><field name="probability">0.05</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><next><block type="placement_heightmap"><field name="heightmap">OCEAN_FLOOR_WG</field><next><block type="placement_biome_filter"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
